hero.label: HERO.LABEL
hero.tagline: We hunt together, we learn together and we conquer challenges as a united front.
hero.subtitle: From web exploitation to reverse engineering — each flag has a hunter.
hero.platforms: HACKTHEBOX · TRYHACKME · HACKINGCLUB · CTFS EN VIVO

items.name: HackTheBox
items.description: The premier cybersecurity training platform. We compete in live machines, challenges, and tournaments.

items.name: TryHackMe
items.description: Interactive learning platform with guided rooms and challenges. Perfect for skill development.

items.name: HackingClub
items.description: Latin American CTF platform for regional competitions and challenges.

items.name: Live CTFs
items.description: In-the-wild competitions and real-world CTF events where we test our skills.

categories.label: DISCIPLINAS
categories.title: NUESTRO ARSENAL
categories.subtitle: Each category is a weapon. All of us are armed.

items.name: OSINT
items.desc: Open-source intelligence gathering and investigation techniques.

items.name: Mobile
items.desc: iOS and Android exploitation and security assessments.

items.name: Web
items.desc: Web application security, SQL injection, XSS, SSRF, IDOR.

items.name: GamePwn
items.desc: Game hacking, memory manipulation, motor tricks and game vulnerabilities.

items.name: Reversing
items.desc: Static and dynamic reverse engineering of VM, firmware and anti-debug.

items.name: AI/ML
items.desc: Machine learning attacks, adversarial examples, neural network exploitation.

items.name: Crypto
items.desc: RSA, ECC, AES, hash collisions and personalized cipher analysis.

items.name: Hardware
items.desc: Hardware hacking, side-channel attacks, exploitation of integrated systems.

items.name: Secure Coding
items.desc: Algorithm challenges, programming puzzles and CTF coding competitions.

items.name: Forensics
items.desc: Memory forensics, disk images, artifact recovery and system analysis.

items.name: Blockchain
items.desc: Smart contract exploitation, blockchain security and cryptocurrency analysis.

items.name: Coding
items.desc: Algorithm challenges, programming puzzles and CTF coding competitions.

items.name: Misc
items.desc: Miscellaneous challenges and unconventional security problems.

about.label: ABOUT US
about.title: WHO WE ARE
about.intro1: Cazabanderas is a Latin American CTF team united by passion for cybersecurity and the thrill of the hunt. We compete across multiple platforms, combining technical expertise with strategic teamwork.
about.intro2: Every challenge solved strengthens our pack. Every flag captured is a victory for the collective. We believe in ethical hacking, continuous learning, and pushing the boundaries of what's possible in cybersecurity.

ethicalHacking.title: ETHICAL HACKING
ethicalHacking.desc: We operate within legal and ethical boundaries, using our skills responsibly to improve security.

packMentality.title: PACK MENTALITY
packMentality.desc: Together we are stronger. We share knowledge, support each other, and hunt as one unified force.

relentlessPursuit.title: RELENTLESS PURSUIT
relentlessPursuit.desc: No challenge is too difficult. We persist, adapt, and overcome every obstacle in our path.

latinRoots.title: LATIN ROOTS
latinRoots.desc: Proud representatives of Latin American cybersecurity. We bring regional talent to the global stage.

team.label: OUR PACK
team.title: OUR PACK
team.subtitle: THE HUNT
team.description: Specialists united in the hunt. Each member brings unique skills and unwavering determination to every challenge.

writeups.label: BASE DE CONOCIMIENTOS
writeups.title: TUTORIALES Y
writeups.subtitle: SOLUCIONES
writeups.description: We share our knowledge. Every challenge solved is a lesson for the entire pack.
writeups.noWriteups: No public write-ups available yet. Check back soon!

achievements.title: LOGROS Y RECONOCIMIENTOS
achievements.subtitle: NUESTROS ÉXITOS
achievements.description: Our victories in the CTF arena

recruitment.title: ÚNETE A LA MANADA
recruitment.subtitle: RECLUTAMIENTO
